boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a sanctions near-match remains visible?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: CLR-TES-074 exactly matches PAY-TES-074 on legal name, country, tax ID DE-4481, account ending 7205 with monitor-only no-block disposition; STD-TES-074-P permits release on exact match
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLR-TES-074 and STD-TES-074-P together close the boundary
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: FLAG-TES-074 does not match counterparty details so does not block
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Clearance and policy both predate release; no open dependency on flag

final_answer: Payment release is permitted. CLR-TES-074 matches PAY-TES-074 exactly on all required fields and carries monitor-only no-block disposition. STD-TES-074-P authorizes release under these conditions. The visible FLAG-TES-074 applies to a non-matching Belarus entity and does not affect the closed boundary.
